name: Russia
summary: Day 63 Thursday. RUSSIA-CUSTODIAN FRAMEWORK STILL PENDING DAY 4 OF 14 (BY 2026-05-11) — NO FORMAL RUSSIAN PROPOSAL. Putin's confirmed message at Apr 27 St. Petersburg meeting: continued strategic partnership, Bushehr two new nuclear units. No movement toward formal Russia-as-custodian proposal that would unlock the US-Iran nuclear talks. Per intel.md A11: UNCHANGED — one-line reference. Russia structurally quadri-faceted (rhetorical support for Iran via state media + intelligence support via permanent communications channel + UNSC veto + still-unrealized mediator-network leg). Russian-oil waiver (30-day India extension) preserves ~1.9 mbpd Russian flow to Indian refiners. Pravda EN Apr 28 ran a CLAIM that 'Mojtaba is firmly in control' — Russia state media single-source/uncorroborated by Western or Iranian-independent outlets. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Day 1 elapsed since Apr 27 Putin-Araghchi Kremlin meeting; the Moscow Times (Apr 13) confirms Russia REPEATED its standing offer to take Iran's highly enriched uranium — NOT a new formal proposal. Iran's foreign ministry publicly stated 'uranium will under no circumstances be transferred anywhere.' Axios (Mar 13) confirmed Trump REJECTED Putin's offer to move Iran's uranium to Russia. Today's meeting therefore did NOT advance the architecture beyond what was already on the table 15 days ago. Yesterday's brief framed Lavrov's attendance as 'operational-seriousness signal'; the operational substance produced is one-tier below that framing. The 14-day Russia-custodian trigger remains WATCHING — Day 1 has produced reaffirmation, not formalization. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

active_triggers.condition: Russia announces formal proposal as nuclear-material custodian within 14 days of Putin-Araghchi meeting (by 2026-05-11)
